objective: plan to Extend an existing React (Vite) website to support a marketing funnel where users coming from WhatsApp can request a free trial and later purchase a paid course using Razorpay.

context.existing_system: A React (Vite) website already exists and uses Sanity CMS for content. The website is deployed and functional. We are adding new funnel functionality on top of the existing system.
marketing_flow: User clicks ad and opens WhatsApp chat
User is redirected to the website trial page
User submits a trial request form
User visits enroll page and completes payment

features_to_build.description: Create a trial request page that captures leads coming from WhatsApp.
behavior: Store trial lead in Sanity CMS

features_to_build.description: Store trial leads in Sanity CMS so trainers can view and follow up with leads.
Create a page where users can purchase the course after completing the trial.
Implement secure payment using Razorpay with server-side verification.
flow: Frontend calls serverless API to create Razorpay order

features_to_build.description: Create serverless endpoints for Razorpay integration.
Display confirmation after successful course purchase.
features_to_build.message: Payment successful. Our team will contact you with next steps.

features_to_build.description: Track marketing conversions for Meta Ads.
